hooks.command:
bash -c 'PLUGIN_ROOT="${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; FILE="$PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/session-start-context.md"; if [ -n "$PLUGIN_ROOT" ] && [ -f "$FILE" ]; then cat "$FILE"; else printf "# Project Protocol — Session Start

Read CLAUDE.md + STATUS.md before touching any code.
Run save-session before closing.
Append to WORKLOG.md after every change.
"; fi'
bash -c 'printf "[project-protocol] For any non-trivial change: classify as NEW / ADDITION / UI CHANGE / BUG FIX. Append to WORKLOG.md after each action.\n"'
bash -c 'if [ -f WORKLOG.md ] && grep -q "^# Worklog — cleared" WORKLOG.md; then printf "[project-protocol] WORKLOG.md is in cleared state — remember to append an entry for this change.\n" >&2; fi'

bash -c 'if [ -f WORKLOG.md ] && [ -s WORKLOG.md ] && ! grep -q "^# Worklog" WORKLOG.md; then BACKUP="WORKLOG.backup-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).md"; cp WORKLOG.md "$BACKUP"; echo "[project-protocol] PreCompact: WORKLOG backed up. Contents preserved below for post-compaction context:"; echo "--- WORKLOG.md CONTENTS ---"; cat WORKLOG.md; echo "--- END WORKLOG ---"; else echo "[project-protocol] PreCompact: WORKLOG.md empty or cleared — no backup needed"; fi'

bash -c 'PLUGIN_ROOT="${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; FILE="$PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/post-compact-context.md"; if [ -n "$PLUGIN_ROOT" ] && [ -f "$FILE" ]; then cat "$FILE"; else printf "# After Compaction — Re-orient

Context was just compacted. Re-read CLAUDE.md and STATUS.md to confirm current state before continuing.
"; fi'
bash -c 'if [ -f WORKLOG.md ] && ! grep -q "^# Worklog — cleared" WORKLOG.md; then printf "[%s] subagent_start\n" "$(date +%H:%M)" >> WORKLOG.md; fi'
bash -c 'if [ -f WORKLOG.md ] && ! grep -q "^# Worklog — cleared" WORKLOG.md; then printf "[%s] subagent_stop\n" "$(date +%H:%M)" >> WORKLOG.md; fi'

bash -c 'if [ -f WORKLOG.md ] && [ -s WORKLOG.md ] && ! grep -q "^# Worklog" WORKLOG.md; then LINE_COUNT=$(wc -l < WORKLOG.md | tr -d " "); echo "[project-protocol] WORKLOG.md has $LINE_COUNT lines of unsaved work. Run save-session before closing."; fi'
